score_evidence.completeness: All 5 required fields present: reviewed_by, reviewed_at, ip_rights_status (clear), compliance_flags (1 advisory flag with detail), approval_status (approved_with_advisory). Score 4.

decision_commentary: Legal review is effective. ip_rights_status addressed. Compliance flag is accurate and has a resolution path. Advisory-only flag does not block proceed. Minor completeness deduction: no systematic review log of all project-type-specific clauses (SECTUR, COFEPRIS, brand standards, FF&E boundary all present in SOW but only FF&E explicitly called out in review). State sync scored 3 per simulated run convention. No auto-fail conditions triggered — IP reviewed, no open unresolved flags (advisory is not a blocking flag), evidence of full proposal review present.
